infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: EcoSortAI uses the camera to scan and classify waste items for recycling guidance.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: EcoSortAI can read photos from your library to classify waste items.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: EcoSortAI can save scanned images to your photo library.

plugins.cameraPermission: EcoSortAI needs camera access to scan waste items for recycling guidance.

plugins.photosPermission: EcoSortAI needs access to your photos to classify waste items for recycling.
